title: Number Sense and Operations with Whole Numbers
description: Place value, multi-digit operations, equations, factors, and numerical patterns.

title: Number Sense and Operations with Fractions and Decimals
description: Equivalent fractions, mixed numbers, decimal reasoning, and fraction operations in context.

title: Geometric Reasoning, Measurement, and Data Analysis and Probability
description: Angles, rectangle formulas, measurement conversion, elapsed time, and line-plot style reasoning.
